ab: ye malu kbraxu ku pila su ho?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Malu ma! Piya kbrexun su?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Cmhungi ku madis pila da, kbrexo ta tikoh pila su ho?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Ini ku adis uri!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Cmhungi ku madis pila da, kbrexo ta tikoh pila su ho?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Uxe ku, ini saku prihi kmbrexan su cuuxan na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Iya, ini saku prihi kmbrexan su cuuxan na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。

ab: Kbrexo ta lukus su ho?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Un, ngali naq.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Kbrexo ta patis su ho?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Wada mu kbrexun Tiwas da.
en: B: I lent it to Tiwas.

ab: Braho su, kbrexo ta Jidensya su ho?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Un, kiya we, yahi ku hmaduc kusun ha.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qmuyux di, ini ku adis trasi, kbrxi ku trasi su ho?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Niqan ku kingal ba trasi, suupu ta tbubung da.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Nii ka kmbrexan mu patis su, nii mu hadun da.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Kmqmita su patis maanu patis, rngagi ku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Knuwan ka yahun mu pririh mege knberxan mu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Ini huwa, niqan pila su de rengo ta ciida.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Knuwan ka yahun su pririh mega kmrexan su kena?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Yahun mu mege kusun ka kmbrxan mu.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Knuwan ka yahun su mege kmbrezan su patis?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Uxe su mu wada sbege ciga ka kmbrexan di?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Knbrexan su na Watan ka ppatis nii?
en: A: Did Watan lend you this pen?

ab: Kiya wa, knbarux mu ali saya.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Knbarux su Watan ka ppatis nii?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Watan?

ab: Uxe, bnaruy bubu mu.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Uka timu da, usa kmbarux tikuh Tumun.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Tumun.

ab: Un, saye ku kmbarux.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Hadi kenan kmbrexn su kesa Tumun.
en: B: Go tell Tumun to give me back my money.

ab: Piya pila knbrex na sunan ka heya?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
